rationale: The citing paper focuses on bilingual rating-scale language effects on emotional intensity (ACE) across nine experiments, whereas the cited paper studies online book reviews’ effects on sales using cross-site differences-in-differences; the notes show no direct overlap in focal constructs, mechanism, or method use. This looks most consistent with an incidental/background mention rather than a core dependency.
